samples.name: spring-boot-guarded-email-agent
samples.description: Plan-and-Verify (Meijer) — statically refuses unsafe LLM-emitted plans before any tool fires: taint (inbox exfiltration) and SMT (over-quota bulk send)
samples.note: Self-contained UI at src/main/resources/static/index.html (Spring-served, no Vite source tree). hasFrontend tracks the Vite convention used by spring-boot-ai-chat etc., not whether a UI exists.

samples.name: spring-boot-personal-assistant
samples.description: Long-lived memory-bearing assistant: AgentState + AgentWorkspace + AgentIdentity + ProtocolBridge + LongTermMemory cross-session recall

samples.name: spring-boot-reattach-harness
samples.description: Deterministic harness for the mid-stream reattach contract (RunRegistry + RunEventReplayBuffer)
samples.note: Test harness for the reattach contract — used by Playwright reattach.spec.ts; not a typical user starter.
